name: claude-buddy
description: 把 Claude Code 的权限审批和会话状态通过 BLE 转给硬件设备（小智 ESP32 或其他兼容 Claude Desktop Hardware Buddy 协议的设备）。使用 PermissionRequest hook，只在真正需要审批时通知 Buddy。按 BOOT 批准，按音量键拒绝。

device_prefix.title: BLE device name prefix
device_prefix.description: Prefix of the BLE advertising name to connect to. Xiaozhi 固件默认广播 'Claude-XXXX'。

owner_name.title: Owner name
owner_name.description: 显示在硬件 INFO 页的 owner 字段（对齐 Claude Desktop 行为）。默认用 $USER。

skip_tools.title: Auto-allow tools
skip_tools.description: 逗号分隔的工具名列表，这些工具不走 BLE 审批直接放行。避免审批疲劳。
